title: TFC Grooming Station
description: Adds grooming stations for TFC to easily domesticate your animals while you focus on more important tasks
body:
Are you forgetting something? With this mod you don't need to worry about it. Let your mind focus on more important things and have the all new grooming station take care of your animals.

No longer will you wake up after a week of neglect and find all your animals estranged and unwilling. Just plop it down, fill it up and carry on with your more important tasks while your animals chow down on your gifts.



There are 9 tiers of grooming stations each with increased range for larger ranching areas.
